title: Link WhatsApp to company phone number and redesign logo to gold 'SS' monogram

requirements.text: Update the WhatsApp link stored in the backend to use the company phone number +91 891 883 2546, so that all WhatsApp entry points (floating chat button, 'Order Sample' CTA in the hero, 'Message on WhatsApp' button in the quote section) resolve to https://wa.me/918918832546

quotes: whatsapp has to be linked to the same phone no. mentioned.

acceptanceCriteria: The backend whatsApp link value is 'https://wa.me/918918832546'
The floating WhatsAppButton component fetches and uses this link, opening a WhatsApp chat to +91 891 883 2546
The 'Order Sample' button in HeroSection links to the same WhatsApp number
The 'Message on WhatsApp' button in QuoteSection links to the same WhatsApp number

requirements.text: Replace the text-based logo in the Navigation bar with a chic, gold-styled 'SS' monogram mark. The logo should be an inline SVG or styled HTML element featuring the letters 'SS' in a luxury gold gradient (using the site's existing gold token, approximately #C9A84C), with elegant thick typography and a refined, high-end feel consistent with the overall luxury B2B theme. The brand name 'SS GLOBAL TRADES' may appear beside it in a smaller weight. The logo must render cleanly on both desktop and mobile.

quotes: change the logo to SS with a nice gold design. keep it chic

acceptanceCriteria: The Navigation bar logo area displays a stylized 'SS' monogram in gold gradient instead of plain text
The monogram uses the site's warm gold color (#C9A84C or equivalent OKLCH token)
The logo is crisp and legible on both desktop and mobile viewports
The overall navigation layout remains intact and the hamburger menu still works on mobile
The design feels chic and consistent with the existing luxury charcoal/gold aesthetic

constraints: Do not change any files under frontend/src/hooks/ (immutable paths)
Do not modify frontend/src/main.tsx or frontend/src/components/ui/
WhatsApp number used must be exactly +91 891 883 2546 (wa.me/918918832546)
nonGoals: Redesigning any section other than the navigation logo
Changing the overall color palette or typography system
Adding new backend endpoints beyond updating the WhatsApp link value
